titleStmt.title: SII 5.446: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 446. (A.R. No. 154 of 1894). ON THE INSIDE OF THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmalart tiruvum poruceya maṭantaiyun tāmaraik kuvimulai ceyappuyat tiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭṭāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉpeṟat taḷaippat teṇṭirai viṭutta maṇṭiṇik kiṭakkait tirunilamaṭantai yurimaiyiṟk kaḷippac camaiyamu nitiyun ta
rumamun taḻaippa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭi yiṭantoṟu meṭuppak karuṅkali kaṉalkeṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiya raruntoḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷarppac curutiyun tamiḻun tolvaḷaṅ kulavap porutira lāḻi pūtalañ cūḻvara Orukai Irucevi mummata nāṟkoṭ ṭayirāvata mutal ceytak
koṟṟat teṇṭicai yāṉai yeruttameṟik kaṇṭanā ṭemateṉak kayal kaḷikūṟa kkocalan tuḷuvaṅ kutiraṅ kuccaram pocala makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅkamiḻaṅ kiṭāraṅ kauṭan teliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉa mutalā vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilakkiḻamai muṭi
puṉai ventark korutaṉi nāyakaṉeṉ ṟulaketta tirumuṭi cūṭic ceṅko loccik koṟṟattāḷk kuḷir kuṭai niḻaṟkiḻk kaṟṟaikkavari kāvalar vica virikatir navamaṇi virasiṁsā saṉat tuṭaṉ muṭicūṭi Uyarkulat tiruveṉap paṅkayamalaṟkaraṅ kuvittup pāṟtivar ma
ṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉic cuṭaroḷi maulik kuyarmaṇime liṭaiyiṭac civanta viṇaimalaṟ ciṟaṭik kamala matukaraṅ kamalameṉṟaṇuku mulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmati matikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟ komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 ḷ 2 100 10 5 ṉāl
māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyil paḷḷiyaṟaikkūṭattup paḷḷippiṭam maḻavarāyaṉi leḻuntaruḷi yiruntu vaṅkippuṟattuc cirāma ṉaḻakaṉāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya brahmādhi- rājaṉ Appāṭṭar veṇāṭuṭaiyār perā leṟṟuvitta kiḻvempanāṭṭu Iravivarmmacca turvvedi maṅkalattil muṉpu Ivar Eṟṟiṉa peruṭpaṭa veda mum śāstra- mum
poy vyākhyā tākkaḷāyirukkum caturvvedibha ṭṭarkaḷ per nāṟpatteṭṭum Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyārkku Addhya yaṉam paṇṇum bha ṭṭarkaḷ per paṉṉiraṇṭum Ākap peraṟupatiṉmar ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi tāṅkaḷ per Aṟupatiṉmarkkum paṅku Aṟupatum tirumeṟkoyiṟcirāma
viṇṇakarāḻvārkkup paṅkiraṇṭum (pa)pāṇṭimāteviśvara muṭaiyārkkup paṅkiraṇṭum maṇaṟpaṭaiviṭṭut toṇṭaimāṉ viṇṇakarāḻvārkkup paṅku Oṉṟum Ākap paṅku Aṟupattaiñcukku Innāṭṭuk kaṇṇaṉūrāṉa māṉāparaṇappāṭikkuk kiḻellai taṇporuntap perāṟṟukku meṟkun teṉṉellai kaṇṇaṉūraā
ṉa śrīmāheśvara ccaturvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yār paṟṟukkum varakuṇiśvara muṭaiyār tevatāṉamāṉa nilattukkum vaṭakkum melellai poṉṉampalaṅkāṭṭiṉāṉ tiruvitikkut teṟku teṉvaṭal pokiṟa kālukku kiḻakkum Itaṉmeṟkkuḷḷa Ūṭutaṭikaḷum tirunelveliuṭaiyār tevatāṉamāṉa nilattukkum tirunelveliyāṉa kulacekaraśca tu
rvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yār paṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai tirunelvelic caṅkaraṉpāṭiyār paṟṟukkum taccaṉūr paṟṟukkum Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiccaturvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yār paṟṟukkum teṟkkum Āka nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamuṅ karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭamuṅ kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparippu muṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatā
ṉap paḷḷiccanta nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperum mutalun tavirttu Ivviravivarmmaccaturvvedi maṅkalattuṭaṉ kūṭṭi Oru rorupura vākka veṉṟum Ivvūr kaṭamai yiṟukkumiṭattu Irupattunālaṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila maḷantu payir pārttu viḷainta nilattukku Antarāyamum viṉiyokamuntaruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārā
cciyum veṭṭiyum pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavu muṭpaṭa māttāṟ kācu kālum mutal virapāṇṭiyaṉāl nellu mukkalamum tulāviṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyi loṉṟupātiyum Eḷ varaku tiṉaippul Iṟuṅku viḷainta nilattukkup patiṉāṟumeṉit tiramam Oṉṟum Āka Eṭṭāvatu mutal Iṟuppatāka viṟai
kaṭṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvaḻakiyapāṇṭiyabrahmādhirā jaṉ Appāṭṭar veṇāṭuṭaiyār perāl Eṟṟuvitta kiḻvempanāṭṭu Iravivarmmaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu muṉpu Ivareṟṟiṉa peruṭpaṭa veda mum śāstra mum poy vyākhyā tākkaḷāyirukku ñca turvvedibha ṭṭarkaḷ per nāṟpatte
ṭṭukkup paṅku nāṟpatteṭṭum Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyārkku Addhyayanam paṇṇum bha ṭṭarkaḷ paṉṉiruvarkkup paṅku paṉṉiraṇṭum Ākap per Aṟupatiṉmarkkup paṅku Aṟupatum Ivvūrt tirumeṟkoyil cirāmaviṇṇakar Āḻvārkkup paṅku Iraṇṭum pāṇṭimāteviśvara muṭaiyārkkup paṅku Iraṇṭum maṇaṟpaṭaiviṭṭut toṉṭaimāṉ vi
ṇṇakar Āḻvārkkup paṅku Oṉṟum Ākap paṅku Aṟupattañcukku Iṉṉāṭṭuk kaṇṇaṉūrāṉa māṉāparaṇappāṭikkuk kiḻellai taṇporuntap perāṟṟukku meṟkun teṉṉellai kaṇṇaṉūrāṉa śrīmā heśvaraccatuvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yār paṟṟukkum varakuṇaīśvara muṭaiyār tevatā
ṉattukkum vaṭakkum melellai poṉṉampalaṅkāṭṭiṉāṉ tiruvitikkut teṟkkut teṉvaṭalāka pokiṟa kālukku kiḻakkum Itaṉ meṟkuḷḷa Ūṭutaṭikaḷum tiruvitikku vaṭakkum Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyār tevatāṉamāṉa nilattukkum tirunelveliyāṉa kulacekaracaturvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yār paṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai tirunelvelic caṅkara
ṉpāṭiyār paṟṟukkun taccaṉūr paṟṟukkum Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiccaturvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yār paṟṟukkum teṟkum Āka nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparippu(m) muṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉap paḷḷiccanta nīkki nīkkiuḷḷa nilam muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻam permutalun tavi
ṟttu Ivviraviparmma ccaturvvedi maṅkalattuṭaṉ kūṭṭi Oru rorupura vākkaveṉṟum Ivvūr kaṭamai Iṟukkumiṭattu Irupattunālaṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila maḷantu payir pārttu viḷainta nilattukku Antarāyamum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyavārāṭcciyum veṭṭiyum pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum ma
ṟṟum Eppeyarppaṭṭaṉavu muṭpaṭa māttāl kācu kālum mutal virapāṇṭiyaṉāl nellu mukkalamum tulāviṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu pātiyum Eḷḷu varaku tiṉaippul liṟuṅku viḷainta nilattukku patiṉāṟumeṉi tirama moṉṟum Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṟuppatākavu miṭṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭ
ṭa Uḷvariyum nammolaiyun taraccoṉṉoṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittukkoḷka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟu veṭciyūrāṉa mummuṭicoḻanallūr veṭṭaṉuṭaiyā ṉaracaṉ civallavaṉāṉa mātavarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai karu
ṅkuṭināṭṭuk kiḻneṭṭurāṉa kirttivicālaiyanallū rarayaṉ piṉpaḻakiya perumā(ḷ)ḷāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyat toṇṭaimā ṉeḻuttu Ivai kāñaiyirukkaiyirāciṅkanallū raraiyaṉ veḷāṉāṉa Aṉantavaṉma ṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.446 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
